chosen_product.product_name: Merrell Moab 3 Mid GORE-TEX Hiking Boots - Men's

reasoning: Filtered/search-narrowed to men's waterproof mid hiking boots under $250 with size 10.5 available, then compared customer-rating-sorted candidates with at least 100 reviews and checked pair weight under 40 oz. The Merrell Moab 3 Mid GORE-TEX had the highest qualifying average rating, strong review count, GORE-TEX waterproofing, mid-cut support, sub-$250 price, and size 10.5 was available to add to cart.
